role_summary: Civil Rights History Project interviewee; one of three subjects of a joint oral history with Toni Breaux and Willie Elliot Jenkins (catalog entry 46, ingestion-only tier).
ai_reading: Geraldine Crawford Bennett shares the embedding signature of the joint oral history at entry 46 (catalog slug 'geraldine-crawford-bennett-toni-breaux-and-willie-elliot-jenkins'); see that catalog page for the substrate-derived neighbor cluster and axis observations the embedding produces for the combined transcript. Individual cosines for each named subject of a joint interview are not separable from the precomputed substrate, since the LoC transcript was recorded as a single audio file with multiple voices interleaved.
biographical_paragraph: Geraldine Crawford Bennett is one of the named subjects of the joint Civil Rights History Project oral history at entry 46 (American Folklife Center accession AFC 2010/039) [src: 1]. This catalog page exists as a per-person index for Geraldine Crawford Bennett; the substrate signature lives on the parent joint-interview page (see the AI's reading above) since the LoC transcript treats the joint conversation as a single recording. Independent biographical sourcing for Geraldine Crawford Bennett is pending.
